novel_features.name: Longhaul nonstop finder
novel_features.description: List every nonstop destination from an airport with flights of at least N hours, optionally scoped to a month.
novel_features.rationale: Requires joining scheduled_departures with route duration in a local store. Kayak shows something similar on the web but no CLI exposes it, and fli lacks the ''all destinations reachable nonstop with >= N hour flights'' query shape.

novel_features.name: Route explore
novel_features.description: List every nonstop destination from an airport with typical duration, operating airlines, and frequency. A Kayak /direct matrix in your terminal.
novel_features.rationale: Built on scheduled_departures aggregation. No existing CLI surfaces the nonstop matrix as structured output.

novel_features.name: Cheapest longhaul dates
novel_features.description: Find the cheapest days to fly the longest nonstop routes from an airport over a date range.
novel_features.rationale: Cross-source join of fli date-range prices with AeroAPI route durations. Neither source answers this alone.

novel_features.name: On-time now
novel_features.description: Show all departures from an airport today with their live on-time status in one call.
novel_features.rationale: Requires scheduled_departures joined with live flight positions. Existing tools make you run separate queries per flight.

novel_features.name: Route reliability
novel_features.description: Historical on-time percentage for a specific route over the last N days.
novel_features.rationale: Derived from AeroAPI /history/flights aggregated locally. Nobody surfaces this as a single metric.

novel_features.name: Search + reliability compare
novel_features.description: Join Google Flights price results with historical on-time reliability per airline for the same route.
novel_features.rationale: Cross-source join of fli search with AeroAPI history. Answers ''cheapest flight that''s also likely on time''.

novel_features.name: Trip monitor
novel_features.description: Watch a flight through its entire lifecycle from booking to arrival, polling status and alerting on changes. Exits on landing.
novel_features.rationale: Combines AeroAPI alerts, positions, and polling in an agent-friendly loop. Other tools let you set alerts but none watch a flight to completion in one command.

novel_features.name: Disruption heatmap
novel_features.description: Single table showing where disruptions are right now across every major airport in a region.
novel_features.rationale: Aggregates /airports/delays and /disruption_counts into one rollup. AeroAPI exposes the data but no tool presents the heatmap view.

novel_features.name: Codeshare resolver
novel_features.description: Show every code for one physical flight so travelers don''t have to hunt codeshares.
novel_features.rationale: Uses /flights/{ident}/canonical plus operator lookup. Native AeroAPI surface but not exposed by any CLI today.
